PFASSTRUCTV5-ToxPrint FP: Table contains DSSTox chemical identifiers (DTXSID, name, CASRN, formula) for the full PFASSTRUCTV5 list (14735), and indicator column for overlapping content in PFASSTRUCTV4 (10586) and PFASOECD (3662) lists.  Table also lists indicator columns for the 7 TxP_PFAS chemotypes used in the OECD Category analysis of Section 5, along with indicator columns for chemicals containing one or more of the 20 TxP_PFAS fluorotelomer (FT) chemotypes or designated as an OECD FT.  The last column of the table lists the assigned OECD Structure-Category Name for the 3662 overlapping OECD vs PFASSTRUCTV5 chemicals, with the last separated column listing the 106 unique OECD Structure Categories.
